title: Avoid shadowing built-in names by local variables
description: This rule checks for local variables that shadow built-in names in Python.
message: Avoid naming local variables the same as built-ins.
recommendation: Use clear, descriptive names for local variables.

noncompliant.description: The local variable 'input' shadows the built-in 'input' function.

compliant.description: The local variable 'my_input' does not shadow the built-in 'input' function.

why_is_this_an_issue: Shadowing built-in names can lead to confusion and unexpected behavior.
how_to_fix: Rename the local variable to avoid shadowing the built-in.
